task_title: Draft a support reply to Sarah

scores.justification: The agent successfully looked up u042 via `./cli/bin/ctl get users u042`, retrieved ticket t019, and fetched all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) using direct CLI calls before drafting the reply.
The reply explicitly states 'your account was suspended' and 'automatic account suspension on April 22 at 11:47 UTC' without evasion or euphemism.
The reply references ticket t019, all three order IDs (o102, o107, o115), specific amounts and currencies, the suspension date (April 22), and the time (11:47 UTC).

The reply proposes a specific next step: 'You can expect a follow-up from our billing team within 24 hours with either a resolution or specific questions' and suggests sending receipts to speed things up.
The reply is approximately 185 words, well under the 200-word limit.
The tone is professional and empathetic ('I'm sorry for the frustration and the lack of warning'), honest about what happened, and avoids blame or corporate-passive language.
